goal: Test whether scoring partial code prefixes can make search over frozen Qwen completions more sample-efficient than ordinary full-code sampling.

gates.oracle_prefix_ceiling: Hidden-test oracle prefix search must beat ordinary full-code sampling at matched completion budget before any value model training is justified.
gates.value_model: A trained prefix value model must recover nontrivial oracle-prefix headroom against lexical and random prefix-selection baselines.
